title: Project Profitability & Utilisation Analytics
description: Analyse consultant utilisation, project margin, client revenue concentration, and delivery health across your services portfolio.
prerequisites: Azure AD account with Fabric workspace creation permissions

sampleData.description: 200 consultants with grade, practice, region, and daily rate
100 clients with industry, region, tier, and contract value
1,000 project engagements with budget, actual spend, status, and margin
50,000 timesheet entries with billable hours, task type, and week

fabricItems.name: proservices_lakehouse
fabricItems.description: Central lakehouse for all professional services analytics

fabricItems.name: 01_bronze_ingest
fabricItems.description: Ingest raw CSV files into Bronze Delta tables

fabricItems.name: 02_silver_transform
fabricItems.description: Derive billable utilisation rate, margin %, delivery health band, and client concentration flags

fabricItems.name: 03_gold_aggregate
fabricItems.description: 6 Gold tables: consultant utilisation, project profitability, client revenue, delivery health, weekly trends, portfolio scorecards

fabricItems.name: 04_reporting_views
fabricItems.description: SQL views: executive summary, low-margin projects, underutilised consultants, client revenue concentration

fabricItems.name: 05_dashboard
fabricItems.description: Interactive HTML dashboard with KPI cards, low-margin projects table, and consultant utilisation summary

fabricItems.name: proservices_analytics_model
fabricItems.description: Direct Lake model with utilisation, margin, and client revenue measures

fabricItems.name: Services Portfolio Dashboard
fabricItems.description: 3-page dashboard: Portfolio Overview, Consultant Utilisation, Client & Revenue

fabricItems.name: daily_proservices_pipeline
fabricItems.description: Orchestrates all notebooks sequentially with retry
